year. 
SHORT NAME: OTHR_INDVDL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: OTHR_INDVDL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
170100000X: Medical genetics, Ph.D. medical genetics 
170300000X: Genetic counselor, MS 
171000000X: Military health care provider 
1710I1002X: Military health care provider — independent
